location.heading: **\#3: Lighting is the difference between amateur and expert**

findings.sentence: While you can also include natural lighting in your setup, make sure that you soften all shadows from your light sources using the principle of [3-point lighting.](https://www.masterclass.com/articles/what-is-three-point-lighting-learn-about-the-lighting-technique-and-tips-for-the-best-three-point-lighting-setups)
findings.title: Link blocks bots (403)
findings.suggested_fix: Link returned 403 to an automated HEAD check. 403 usually means the site is bot-blocking, not that the link is broken. Spot-check in a browser to confirm.

findings.title: Link blocks bots (405)
findings.suggested_fix: www.linkedin.com blocks automated checks (returned 405). Manual spot-check in a browser if you want to be sure.
